positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a lunar rover exploring a vibrant alien landscape at twilight. The rover has clean, geometric lines, set against a gradient sky of deep sapphire blue and ethereal magenta. The landscape features stylized, abstract flora and crystalline rock formations that catch the light. Composition is highly centered, with the main subject (the rover) in the foreground, creating a strong, symmetrical silhouette against the dramatic, diffused backlighting. Style is a blend of vector art, retro-futurism, and pop art. Focus on high contrast, clean edges, and a limited, vibrant color palette suitable for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, hyper-detailed, crisp lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, signature, grainy, noise, poor anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyright, low quality
